table_summary: Зээл бүрийн өдрийн дэлгэрэнгүй мэдээллийг агуулсан, урьдчилан нэгтгэсэн иж бүрэн харагдац. Энэ нь харилцагчийн мэдээлэл, дансны дэлгэрэнгүй, өдрийн үлдэгдлийн дата, эрсдэлийн ангилал зэргийг нэгтгэсэн болно. Зээлтэй холбоотой ихэнх асуултын хувьд энэ нь үндсэн эх үүсвэр байх ёстой. (A comprehensive, pre-joined view providing a detailed daily snapshot of each loan. It combines customer information, account details, daily balance data, risk classifications, and payment schedules. This should be the primary source for most loan-related questions.)

column_descriptions.txn_date: Гүйлгээний огноо (Transaction Date). The snapshot date for the loan's balance and status. **This is the most important column for time-based queries. To find the latest state of a loan, you must order by this column descending and take the top row.** Sample values: '01/02/2018', '11/25/2015'.
column_descriptions.acnt_code: Зээлийн дансны дугаар (Loan Account Number). The unique identifier for a specific loan account. This is the primary key for joining loan-related data. Sample values: 3600012356, MN270050003600012356.
column_descriptions.cur_code: Валют (Currency). The currency code for all monetary values in this row (e.g., MNT, USD). All amount columns are in this currency. Sample values: MNT, USD, EUR, JPY, CNY. If you search amount columns, you must also filter by this currency.
column_descriptions.rate: Валютын ханш (Exchange Rate). The exchange rate for the currency on the 'txn_date'. Sample values: 1.0 (for MNT), 2850.0 (for USD), 3400.0 (for EUR).
column_descriptions.approv_amount: Зээлийн баталсан дүн (Approved Amount). The total amount of the loan that was approved. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 1000000.0, 5000.0.
column_descriptions.adv_amount: Зээл олгосон дүн (Advanced/Disbursed Amount). The amount of the loan that has been given to the customer. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 800000.0, 3000.0.
column_descriptions.principal: Зээлийн үндсэн үлдэгдэл (Principal Balance). The remaining principal balance of the loan as of 'txn_date'. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 27417971.98, 0.
column_descriptions.adv_int: Урьдчилж төлсөн хүү (Advanced Interest). Interest that was paid in advance. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 4000000000.
column_descriptions.int_rcv: Хуримтлагдсан хүү (Interest Received). Accumulated interest that has been received. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 4083371.55, 152857986.36, 0.
column_descriptions.int_rcv_bill: Хүүгийн өрийн дүн (Interest Billed). The amount of interest that has been billed to the customer. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 3820982.48, 3778313.61, 0.
column_descriptions.depr_fee_inc: Depreciation Fee Income. Income recognized from depreciation fees related to the loan. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 157108452.75.
column_descriptions.available: Боломжит дүн (Available Amount). The available loan amount that can still be drawn by the borrower under a commitment. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 5000000000, 510.
column_descriptions.cont_available: Commitment зээлийн дүн (Contingent Available). The contingent available loan amount. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 12575948917, 8320.62.
column_descriptions.principal_bill: Үндсэн зээлийн өр (Principal Due). The amount of principal that is currently overdue and billed. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: -0.99, 180587479703.17.
column_descriptions.due_princ_date: Үндсэн зээлийн хугацаа хэтэрсэн огноо (Principal Due Date). The date when the principal payment became overdue. If NULL, the principal is not overdue. Sample values: '11/25/2015', '12/31/2017'.
column_descriptions.due_princ_days: Үндсэн зээлийн хугацаа хэтэрсэн хоног (Principal Days Overdue). The number of days the principal payment is overdue. If 0, the principal is not overdue. Sample values: 0, 30, 365.
column_descriptions.due_int_date: Хүүгийн хугацаа хэтэрч эхэлсэн огноо (Interest Due Date). The date when the interest payment became overdue. If NULL, the interest is not overdue. Sample values: '11/25/2015', '12/31/2017'.
column_descriptions.due_int_days: Хүүгийн хугацаа хэтэрсэн хоног (Interest Days Overdue). The number of days the interest payment is overdue. If 0, the interest is not overdue. Sample values: 0, 30, 365.
column_descriptions.class_no: Зээлийн ангилал (Classification Number). The numeric code for the loan's risk classification. Its name is in 'class_name'. Sample values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5.
column_descriptions.class_no_trm: Хугацаанаас хамаарсан зээлийн ангилал (Term-based Classification). Loan classification based on its term structure. Sample values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5.
column_descriptions.class_no_qlt: Зээлийн чанарын ангилал (Quality-based Classification). Loan classification based on its quality assessment. Sample values: 1, 2, 3.
column_descriptions.impairment_per: Эрсдэлийн сангийн хувь (Impairment Percentage). The percentage used for the loan's risk provision. Sample values: 0, 20.0, 50.0, 100.
column_descriptions.account_manager: Зээл хариуцсан эдийн засагч (Account Manager Code). The numeric code for the account manager. Sample values: 10589, 20456.
column_descriptions.start_date: Зээлийн данс нээсэн огноо (Account Opening Date). Энэ бол зээлийн данс системд бүртгэгдсэн техникийн огноо бөгөөд зээл бодитоор олгогдсон огноо БИШ юм. 'Анхны зээл'-ийг тодорхойлоход бүү ашигла. (This is the technical date the account was created in the system, NOT the date the loan was actually given. Do not use for finding the 'first loan'.) Sample values: '01/02/2018', '11/25/2015'.
column_descriptions.end_date: Зээлийн данс дуусах огноо (Account End Date). The official maturity date of the loan. Sample values: '01/02/2030', '11/25/2028'.
column_descriptions.int_rate: Зээлийн хүүний хувь (Interest Rate). The annual interest rate percentage for the loan. Sample values: 12.0, 7, 18.3.
column_descriptions.fine_princ_rcv: Торгуулын хүү (Fine on Principal Received). Fines or penalties received on overdue principal. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 150000.0.
column_descriptions.principal_off: Тэнцлийн гадуурх үндсэн зээл (Principal Written-Off). Principal amount that has been written off the balance sheet. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 0.02, 4895188845.47.
column_descriptions.int_rcv_off: Тэнцлийн гадуурх хуримтлагдсан хүү (Interest Written-Off). Interest amount that has been written off. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 123456.78, 18694674.26.
column_descriptions.int_rcv_bill_off: Тэнцлийн гадуурх хүүний өр (Billed Interest Written-Off). Billed interest amount that has been written off. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 123456.78, 18694674.26.
column_descriptions.fine_princ_rcv_off: Тэнцлийн гадуурх торгуулийн хүү (Fine on Principal Written-Off). Fines on principal that have been written off. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 150000.0, 12721694.8.
column_descriptions.impairment_per_audit: Аудитын залруулгаар тохируулсан Эрсдэлийн сангийн хувь (Audited Impairment Percentage). The impairment percentage as corrected by an audit. Sample values: 0, 20.0, 50.0, 100.
column_descriptions.class_no_audit: Аудитлагдсан зээлийн ангилал (Audited Classification). The loan classification as corrected by an audit. Its name is in 'class_name'. Sample values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5.
column_descriptions.theor: Онолын үлдэгдэл (Theoretical Balance). A theoretical balance value, likely for internal calculation or validation. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 1000000.0, 27417971.98.
column_descriptions.is_audit_entry: Аудитын залруулга оруулсан эсэх (Is Audit Entry). A flag (0/1) indicating if this record is an audit entry. Sample values: 0 (No), 1 (Yes).
column_descriptions.principal_audit: Аудитын залруулсан зээлийн үлдэгдэл (Audited Principal). The principal balance as corrected by an audit. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 27417971.98.
column_descriptions.int_rcv_audit: Аудитын залруулсан хуримтлагдсан хүү (Audited Interest Received). The interest received as corrected by an audit. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 4083371.55.
column_descriptions.fine_princ_rcv_audit: Аудитын залруулсан торгуулийн хүү (Audited Fine on Principal). The fine on principal as corrected by an audit. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 150000.0.
column_descriptions.principal_bill_audit: Аудитын залруулсан үндсэн зээлийн өр (Audited Principal Billed). The billed principal amount as corrected by an audit. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 27417971.98.
column_descriptions.int_rcv_bill_audit: Аудитын залруулсан хүүгийн өр (Audited Interest Billed). The billed interest amount as corrected by an audit. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. Sample values: 0, 4083371.55.
column_descriptions.adv_date: Зээл олгосон огноо (Disbursement Date). Зээл бодитоор олгогдсон огноо. 'Анхны','хамгийн эхний', 'хамгийн сүүлийн' зээлийг тодорхойлоход ЭНЭ БАГАНЫГ ашиглана уу. **(The date the loan was actually disbursed. Use THIS COLUMN to determine the 'first' or 'oldest' loan.)** Sample values: '01/02/2018', '11/25/2015'.
column_descriptions.acnt_name: Дансны нэр (Account Name). The descriptive name of the account, often the customer's name. Can be the same across different 'acnt_code' values if they are for different projects. Sample values: 'ТАВАН БОГД ХХК', 'ХҮЧ СПОРТ ХОРОО ХХК', 'БИЗНЕС ПЛАН ХХК'.
column_descriptions.project_name: Төслийн нэр (Project Name). Defines the specific project for which the loan was issued. This column explains why the same 'acnt_name' might have multiple different loan accounts ('acnt_code'). Sample values: 'ТҮМЭН ОХИДУУД 236 АЙЛЫН ОРОН СУУЦНЫ ТӨСӨЛ', 'ХӨДӨӨ АЖ АХУЙН ҮЙЛДВЭРЛЭЛИЙГ ДЭМЖИХ ТӨСӨЛ', 'ЖИЖИГ ДУНД ҮЙЛДВЭРЛЭЛИЙГ ДЭМЖИХ ТӨСӨЛ'.
column_descriptions.cust_code: Хэрэглэгчийн дугаар (Customer Code). The unique identifier for the customer who owns the loan. A single customer can have multiple loan accounts. Sample values: 9360055555, 9360099999, 9360077777, 9360066666.
column_descriptions.customer_name: Хэрэглэгчийн нэр (Customer Name). The name of the customer associated with 'cust_code'. Sample values: 'ТАВАН БОГД ХХК', 'НҮҮРС УУРХАЙ ХХК', 'ЕРӨӨЛТ САЙН БАНК', 'ЕРӨӨЛТ ЭРДЭНЭС УУРХАЙ ХХК'.
column_descriptions.class_name: Зээлийн ангилалын нэр (Classification Name). The descriptive name for the 'class_no'. Sample values: 'ХЭВИЙН', 'АНХААРАЛ ХАНДУУЛАХ', 'ХЭВИЙН БУС', 'ЭРГЭЛЗЭЭТЭЙ', 'МУУ'.
column_descriptions.account_manager_name: Зээл хариуцсан эдийн засагчийн нэр (Account Manager Name). The full name of the account manager. Sample values: 'БАТ-ОРГИЛЫН.Б', 'БАТ-ОРГИЛЫН.О', 'БАТ-ОРГИЛЫН.Э'.
column_descriptions.status: Зээлийн дансны төлөв (Loan Account Status). The current status of the loan account (O: Open, C: Closed, D: Deleted/Cancelled). Sample values: 'O', 'C', 'D'.
